summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PHASE 29.5 Strategy Brain API endpoints. All 12 test cases passed successfully, verifying hypothesis-to-strategy mapping, suitability score calculation, execution filters, and integration with Hypothesis Engine.
passed_tests: Strategy Decision BTC endpoint - returns strategy decision based on hypothesis
Suitability score calculation - validates score formula components
UNFAVORABLE execution blocks strategy - execution filter working correctly
Strategy Summary endpoint - returns strategy statistics and averages
Strategy History endpoint - returns decision history with proper structure
Strategy Recompute endpoint - force recomputes strategy with new data
Strategy Available endpoint - returns strategies and hypothesis mapping
